items.badge_description: One cannot live on dank hops alone. Tone down the bitterness and enjoy some smooth flavor. That's 155 different beers with an IBU of 20 or below. Try 5 more for Level 32!
China's beer culture is rapidly shifting and a taste for craft beer is emerging. While craft breweries may still be scarce, the fire has been lit for more. Try 5 more for Level 4!
China's beer culture is rapidly shifting and a taste for craft beer is emerging. While craft breweries may still be scarce, the fire has been lit for more. Try 5 more for Level 3!
One cannot live on dank hops alone. Tone down the bitterness and enjoy some smooth flavor. That's 140 different beers with an IBU of 20 or below. Try 5 more for Level 29!

If your mash uses more than 50% wheat, you’ve got yourself a wheat beer. This diverse family includes goses, hefeweizens, American wheat ales, and more! That's 35 different beers in the "Wheat" category! Try 5 more for Level 8!

Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 415 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower.
One cannot live on dank hops alone. Tone down the bitterness and enjoy some smooth flavor. That's 55 different beers with an IBU of 20 or below. Try 5 more for Level 12!

There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 105 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 22!
It may not be cloudy outside, but your brew definitely is! That’s at least 5 different hefeweizens. Try 5 more to unlock Level 2.

user.bio: I have had a beer from 6 continents! Just wish I would have found Untappd sooner! Cheers!

items.badge_description: Wine isn't the only beverage worthy of pairing with a delicious meal. With so many styles widely available, there’s a perfect pint for any cuisine of your choosing. That's a beer at 235 different venues categorized as a Restaurant. Try 5 more for Level 48!

Thanks for staying at home, and checking in with Untappd! It allows us to stay connected to a community of beer lovers, just like you, even if we can't be in the same physical location. From our home to yours, cheers and stay safe!

While spontaneity can be fun, sometimes you want to make sure your adventure will rock. Checkout the menu at an Untappd Verified Venue before visiting and know exactly what’s on tap! That's 200 check-ins at venue that is verified. Try 5 more for Level 41!

It takes the perfect amount of light, the right framing and a touch of creative love to get the perfect picture of your brew. Now it’s time to drink it! That's 295 check-ins with a photo.  Try 5 more for Level 60!
